description: Use this API to retrieve the list of files being tracked. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, sfiles, stypes = scenariotrackfilelist()

return_values.name: sfiles
return_values.description: An array of NFILES elements specifying list of files currently being tracked. (output).

return_values.name: stypes
return_values.description: An array of NFILES elements specifying list of file type identifiers for each file being tracked. (output).
